description: Our most popular signature drink. A house-made pistachio butter base paired with delicate rose water and honey syrup, topped with espresso and velvety steamed milk. Rich, nutty, and highly aromatic without being overly sweet.

A comforting fusion of roasted South Indian filter coffee decoction and dark cocoa, finished with a warming pinch of cinnamon, nutmeg, and dry ginger. A beautifully spiced take on the traditional mocha.

Our 20-hour steeped cold brew infused with nitrogen for a cascading, creamy texture. Swirled with house-made dark caramel sauce and finished with a pinch of flaky sea salt for an addictive sweet-salty balance.
A tropical escape in a cup. A double shot of espresso blended with silky coconut cream, condensed milk, vanilla, and a hint of star anise. Served hot with toasted coconut flakes on top.
An immune-boosting, caffeine-free alternative (or add an espresso shot!). Steamed oat milk infused with our vibrant turmeric spice blend, fresh ginger, cinnamon, and raw organic honey.

A curated cold brew experience. Premium single-origin cold brew poured over ice and agave, elegantly topped with a thick layer of whipped sweet double cream, freshly grated nutmeg, and grapefruit zest.
A pristine double shot of our signature Ember dark roast, pulling complex notes of dark cocoa and toasted hazelnut with a perfectly thick, golden crema.
Two shots of rich espresso poured gracefully over 180°F filtered water. A smooth, robust, and full-bodied cup that highlights the nuanced flavors of our house blend.
A harmonious balance of bold espresso and sweet, steamed milk, carefully poured to create a light layer of micro-foam and beautiful latte art.
Crafted in the true Italian style. Equal thirds of intense espresso, steamed milk, and a deep, airy layer of thick milk foam. Dusted with cocoa powder upon request.
Steamed milk infused with real Madagascar vanilla bean syrup, marked with a bold shot of espresso poured directly through the foam, and finished with a caramel crosshatch.
A decadent blend of our signature espresso, bittersweet dark chocolate ganache, and steamed milk. A sophisticated treat for coffee and chocolate lovers alike.
Two concentrated ristretto shots of espresso folded intimately with velvety, sweet steamed whole milk. A stronger coffee flavor than a latte with a uniquely smooth texture.
A perfect 1:1 ratio. A double shot of espresso cut exactly with an equal amount of lightly steamed milk to reduce the acidity while retaining the coffee's powerful character.
Bold black tea heavily infused with a fragrant mix of cardamom, cinnamon, black pepper, and star anise, combined with steamed milk for a warming, spicy-sweet profile.
Ceremonial-grade, stone-ground Japanese matcha powder, lightly sweetened with cane sugar and whisked vigorously into hot steamed milk for an earthy, antioxidant-rich lift.
A cozy, aromatic classic. Bright, citrusy Earl Grey tea steeped strong, sweetened with a touch of vanilla syrup, and topped with a thick cap of steamed milk.
A soothing, caffeine-free herbal blend of whole Egyptian chamomile flowers, sweet orange peel, and a hint of lemongrass. Perfect for relaxing afternoon sipping.
Freshly pulled espresso shots chilled rapidly over ice and topped with your choice of cold milk. A refreshing, coffee-forward staple for warm days.
Crisp, bold, and fiercely caffeinated. Two shots of espresso poured over ice and topped with cold filtered water to preserve the coffee's dark, rich crema.

Coarse-ground single-origin beans steeped in cool, filtered water for exactly 20 hours. This slow extraction produces a remarkably smooth coffee with naturally sweet chocolate notes and zero bitterness.
Cold milk mixed with vanilla syrup and poured over ice, layered with floating shots of dark espresso, and finished with a generous drizzle of buttery caramel.
Espresso and bittersweet chocolate ganache dissolved together, mixed with cold milk, and served over ice. The ultimate chilled chocolate-coffee indulgence.
Our signature cold brew concentrate blended with milk, ice, and rich mocha syrup until perfectly frosty. Topped with whipped cream and chocolate shavings.
A frosty, blended treat featuring coffee roast, milk, ice, and sweet caramel syrup. Crowned with whipped cream and a thick caramel ribbon.
Imported French butter folded through countless layers of dough, baked fresh daily until deeply golden and shatteringly crisp on the outside, yet soft and airy inside.
Our signature flaky, buttery croissant dough wrapped around two thick batons of premium, semi-sweet Belgian dark chocolate. Best enjoyed slightly warmed.
A tender, moist muffin bursting with wild blueberries and bright lemon zest, crowned with a crunchy, buttery brown-sugar streusel topping.
A thick, comforting slice of incredibly moist banana bread, made with overripe bananas, warm cinnamon, and generous chunks of toasted walnuts.
A massive, bakery-style cookie with crispy edges and a chewy, gooey center. Packed with puddles of dark chocolate chunks and finished with Maldon sea salt.
A thick-cut slice of rustic, toasted sourdough bread loaded with fresh, lemon-spiked smashed avocado, sprinkled with everything-bagel seasoning and micro-greens.
